scripts.test:formr: bun test packages/formr-core/src packages/predicate/src packages/formr-from-schema/src packages/formr-react/src
scripts.test:conformance: bun test --test-name-pattern F[0-9] packages/formr-core/src packages/predicate/src packages/formr-from-schema/src
scripts.lint: biome check --diagnostic-level=error . && npm run check:architecture-guardrails --silent && npm run check:code-principles --silent && npm run check:config-schema --silent && npm run check:change-policies --silent && npm run check:ghost-tokens --silent && tsc --pretty false -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: npm run build --silent && tsc --pretty false -p apps/shell/tsconfig.test.json && tsc --pretty false -p apps/backend/tsconfig.test.json && node --test packages/*/test/*.test.mjs apps/shell/test/*.test.mjs apps/shell/src/*.integration.test.mjs apps/shell/dist-test/src/context-state.spec.js apps/shell/dist-test/src/window-bridge.spec.js apps/backend/test/*.test.mjs scripts/test/*.test.mjs && node --test --import ./apps/backend/test/register-ts-hooks.mjs apps/backend/test/*.test-hooked.mjs
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n backend,plugins,shell -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:plugins" "npm run dev:shell"
